label: OEM data window start
sourceNote: Exact epoch from committed normalized official NASA Artemis I OEM dataset (data/normalized/artemis-1.json).
description: First available sample in the committed Artemis I normalized OEM file.

label: Orion/ICPS separation
sourceNote: Derived from NASA Artemis I Mission Timeline MET 000/01:57:36 plus official launch epoch 2022-11-16T06:47:44Z.
description: Orion separated from the interim cryogenic propulsion stage.

label: Outbound trajectory correction burn-2
sourceNote: Derived from NASA Artemis I Mission Timeline MET 001/04:47:31 plus official launch epoch 2022-11-16T06:47:44Z.

label: Outbound powered flyby burn
sourceNote: Derived from NASA Artemis I Mission Timeline MET 005/06:40:14 plus official launch epoch 2022-11-16T06:47:44Z.
description: Main burn during outbound lunar flyby.

label: Distant retrograde orbit insertion burn
sourceNote: Derived from NASA Artemis I Mission Timeline MET 009/15:48:27 plus official launch epoch 2022-11-16T06:47:44Z.
description: Orion entered distant retrograde orbit around the Moon.

label: Distant retrograde orbit departure
sourceNote: Derived from NASA Artemis I Mission Timeline MET 015/15:49:56 plus official launch epoch 2022-11-16T06:47:44Z.
description: Departure burn from distant retrograde orbit.

label: Return powered flyby burn
sourceNote: Derived from NASA Artemis I Mission Timeline MET 019/10:24:00 plus official launch epoch 2022-11-16T06:47:44Z.
description: Final major lunar flyby burn that committed return trajectory.

label: OEM data window end
sourceNote: Exact epoch from committed normalized official NASA Artemis I OEM dataset (data/normalized/artemis-1.json).
description: Last available sample in the committed Artemis I normalized OEM file.
